name: East Fish Processing L.L.C
description: The company is a leading distributor of fresh and frozen seafood in the UAE, sourcing high-quality products from pristine waters to ensure safety and quality. With a commitment to innovative and value-added offerings, it serves various markets, including the Middle East and Europe.

name: Polar Seafood Denmark
description: Polar Seafood Greenland A/S is a major supplier of frozen seafood, offering a wide range of products including cold-water prawns, cod, and snow crab. With over 30 years of experience and a modern fleet, the company is dedicated to providing high-quality seafood to various markets.

name: Seafood Sales Aps
description: Seafood Sales specializes in frozen seafood and emphasizes their commitment to quality through rigorous pre-production and pre-shipment inspections. Their proactive approach ensures that all products meet regulations and customer expectations before delivery.

name: Ocean Treasure World Foods Limited
description: Ocean Treasure Foods Limited specializes in supplying a diverse range of frozen seafood from Asia, particularly from Mainland China and Vietnam. They process and deliver frozen seafood to the international market, ensuring adherence to client specifications and maintaining high standards through various certifications.

name: Golden Fresh Sdn Bhd
description: Golden Fresh Sdn Bhd is a prominent player in the frozen seafood industry, offering a wide range of high-quality products such as fish, squid, and prawns. With a strong focus on quality control and innovation, the company ensures that its seafood products meet stringent safety standards, making it a reliable supplier for diverse seafood needs.

name: Cold Locker Processing and Storage
description: The company specializes in producing frozen seafood, offering over 10 million pounds of ready-to-cook portions and fillets each year, which supports private label programs for retail and grocery chains. Their commitment to quality and efficiency ensures that seafood is delivered fresh and safe, with temperature-controlled storage and integrated logistics.

name: Frozen Fish International Gmbh
description: Frozen Fish International GmbH is a key player in the frozen seafood market, specializing in high-quality frozen fish products that meet Marine Stewardship Council (MSC) certification standards.

name: North Coast Seafoods
description: North Coast Seafoods is a Boston-based distributor that specializes in high-quality, sustainable seafood, including a variety of frozen options. With a commitment to freshness and direct partnerships with fishermen, they ensure a consistent supply of seafood like shrimp, cod, and scallops, making them a top choice for wholesale seafood.

name: Raw Seafoods
description: The company offers a vast and unmatched assortment of frozen seafood, highlighting their passion and commitment to providing innovative, high-quality products that enhance culinary experiences.

name: The Deep Seafood Company LLC
description: The Deep Seafood Company (LLC) specializes in high-quality seafood products, including a comprehensive range of frozen options. With over three decades of experience and a state-of-the-art processing facility, the company ensures quality and freshness, catering to both domestic and international markets.
